name: CONDYLOMA ACUMINATA

demographics.Prevalence: 0.5-5% of male patients with cutaneous disease

dominant_finding: multiple papillary filling defects in anterior urethra
distribution: multiple papillary filling defects in anterior urethra
discriminating_features: multiple papillary filling defects in anterior urethra

Skin: multiple papillary filling defects in anterior urethra

retrograde urethrography NOT recommended as it may cause retrograde seeding!
clinical.Rx: instillation of podophyllin, thiotepa, 5-fluorouracil into urethra
